zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Gascoigne於大約1406年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir William Gascoigne II22歲，母親Joan Wyman22歲。她和Sir John Saville至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1482年7月3日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年77歲，埋葬在英國越可爾利德斯利德斯 明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Gascoigne was born about 1406, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Gascoigne II, was 22 and her mother, Joan Wyman, was 22. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Sir John Saville. She died on 3 July 1482, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Gascoigne est née environ 1406, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gascoigne II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Wyman, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Sir John Saville. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1482, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Leeds Minster, Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Gascoigneが約1406年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Gascoigne IIは22歳，母Joan Wymanは22歳であった。彼女はSir John Savilleとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1482年7月3日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで77歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリーズリーズ ミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Gascoigne(이)가 대략 1406년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Gascoigne II(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Wyman(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Saville(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 7월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 민스터에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir John Saville. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1482, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Gascoigne родилась около 1406 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Gascoigne II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Wyman, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Sir John Saville. Она умерла 3 июля 1482 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности лидс минстир, лидс, еркшир, Англия.
